reviews.review_description:
Mad Stylist is a refreshing, fun, and creatively rich VR sandbox experience. 
If you enjoy tinkering with wacky looks, testing impossible tools, and having fun in a relaxed VR environment, this title is for you!

Deck out picky patrons" sounds polite😂, but we all know what we're really doing: committing virtual art crimes. I'm not here to make them look good😊; I'm here to see how badly I can mess up before they walk out. That "squirm in pain" feature is calling my name. Sorry, Potato Bro, you're about to have a bad day.

Imagine walking into a shop asking to be a bold superhero and walking out looking like a moldy avocado😍😍. The trust fall this game simulates is unreal. I can't wait to see gameplay of people accidentally creating masterpieces and absolutely cursed abominations. There is no in-between, and that's the beauty of it.

Okay, "Mushroom Junior" looks way too innocent for the chaos 😜I'm about to unleash. The idea that I can either make him a hero or absolutely ruin his day with my spray gun🌠? That's the kind of power I didn't know I needed. This is therapy, but make it unhinged. My art teacher said I have no talent—well, who's laughing now? (Probably the crying mushroom.)
